Title: Honest Thief
Writer: Steve Allrich, Mark Williams, Louis Per Bruno
Actors: Liam Neeson, Kate Walsh, Jai Courtney
Plot: They call him the In-and-Out-Bandit because meticulous thief Tom Carter (Liam Neeson) has stolen $9 million from small-town banks while managing to keep his identity a secret. But after he falls in love with the bubbly Annie (Kate Walsh), Tom decides to make a fresh start by coming clean about his criminal past, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.
